name: Gateway → Claude: Architecture
text:
source ~/Developer.nosync/21_systems/nexus-command/.env.local
REDIRECT=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{redirect_url}" -X POST "$DEV_WEBHOOK_URL" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"action":"route","task_type":"architecture","prompt":"[DESCRIBE YOUR SYSTEM OR PASTE CODE]"}')
curl -s "$REDIRECT"
